description: PRD-2 Blueprint frontend port. Port the Blueprint design system from frontend-design/ into the real Next.js app, screen-by-screen, preserving every shipped Slice 01-09 feature. After this PRD lands, the signed-in OCA flow (Inbox -> Projects -> Dashboard -> Equipment -> ChecklistDetail) matches the Blueprint mockup at frontend-design/_check/ with correct typography (Archivo + JetBrains Mono), light + dark themes, and the .bp-* utility class system. See GitHub issue #17 for full PRD context. Glossary alias: 'Equipment' is the UI label for TestProcedureInstance joined with ExtractedSpec (no Asset table in v0). Inbox (OCA persona home, cross-project) and Dashboard (project home) are distinct concepts and must not be conflated.

userStories.title: Copy blueprint.css and wire Archivo + JetBrains Mono fonts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want blueprint.css available globally and the Blueprint fonts loaded, so that subsequent stories can use .bp-* classes and Blueprint typography.
acceptanceCriteria: Copy frontend-design/blueprint.css verbatim to frontend/src/styles/blueprint.css (no edits)
Import frontend/src/styles/blueprint.css globally in frontend/src/app/layout.tsx
Add Archivo and JetBrains Mono via next/font/google in layout.tsx, exposing them as CSS variables --font-archivo and --font-jetbrains-mono
Update frontend/src/app/globals.css so html/body inherit Archivo through the CSS variable
Existing pages (auth, dashboard, inbox, project, entity) still render without crashing
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create (app) route group with Blueprint shell layout
userStories.description: As a signed-in user, I want a Blueprint sidebar + topbar shell wrapping every signed-in page, so that the app feels unified.
acceptanceCriteria: Create frontend/src/app/(app)/ route group with a layout.tsx that renders the Blueprint shell (.bp-app grid: 232px sidebar + main)
Sidebar contains nav items: Inbox (linking /inbox), Projects (linking /projects, placeholder for now), theme toggle
Topbar renders per blueprint-app.jsx::Topbar pattern
Move existing dashboard, inbox, project, entity pages under (app)/ so they inherit the shell
Auth route stays outside the shell (/auth keeps no sidebar)
Theme toggle switches data-theme attribute on documentElement; blueprint.css :root and [data-theme=dark] both apply correctly
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: PRD #17 Slice A. Depends on US-001.

userStories.title: Write ADR-0001 + domain glossary additions
userStories.description: As a future developer, I want the CSS strategy decision and the Equipment/Inbox glossary captured, so that the rationale is preserved.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/adr/0001-css-strategy-blueprint.md documenting the decision to copy blueprint.css wholesale and use .bp-* classes (context, decision, consequences sections)

Append a Glossary section to docs/architecture.md with two entries: 'Equipment' as UI alias for TestProcedureInstance + ExtractedSpec join (no Asset table in v0); 'Inbox' vs 'Dashboard' as distinct concepts (Inbox = OCA persona home, cross-project; Dashboard = project home)
Typecheck passes

Add npm scripts: 'test' (vitest run) and 'test:watch' (vitest)
Add a smoke test at frontend/src/lib/__tests__/smoke.test.ts that asserts true and passes
npm test exits 0 in the frontend directory
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: PRD #17. Infra for US-009, US-013, US-017.
